campaign_kpi.description: Stores key performance indicators (KPIs) for media campaigns.

schema.name: mp_client_name
schema.description: The name of the client associated with the campaign.

schema.name: mba_number
schema.description: The MBA number of the campaign.

schema.name: version_number
schema.description: The version number of the media plan for the campaign.

schema.name: campaign_name
schema.description: The name of the campaign.

schema.name: media_type
schema.description: The type of media (e.g., Digital Display, Social Media, TV).

schema.name: publisher
schema.description: The publisher involved in the campaign activity.

schema.name: bid_strategy
schema.description: The bidding strategy used for the campaign.

schema.name: ctr
schema.description: Click-Through Rate (CTR) for the campaign activity.

schema.name: cpv
schema.description: Cost Per View (CPV) for the campaign activity.

schema.name: conversion_rate
schema.description: Conversion Rate for the campaign activity.

schema.name: vtr
schema.description: View-Through Rate (VTR) for the campaign activity.

schema.name: frequency
schema.description: Average frequency of ad exposure for the campaign activity.

client_kpi.description: Stores key performance indicators (KPIs) for clients across different publishers and media types.

schema.name: mp_client_name
schema.description: The name of the client associated with the KPI.

schema.name: publisher_name
schema.description: The name of the publisher for which the KPI is tracked.

schema.name: media_type
schema.description: The type of media (e.g., Digital Display, Digital Video, Social Media).

schema.name: bid_strategy
schema.description: The bidding strategy used for the media type.

schema.name: ctr
schema.description: Click-Through Rate (CTR) for the media activity.

schema.name: cpv
schema.description: Cost Per View (CPV) for the media activity.

schema.name: conversion_rate
schema.description: Conversion Rate for the media activity.

schema.name: vtr
schema.description: View-Through Rate (VTR) for the media activity.

schema.name: frequency
schema.description: Average frequency of ad exposure for the media activity.

creative_asset.description: Stores information about creative assets used in media plans.

schema.name: mba_number
schema.description: The MBA number associated with the creative asset.

schema.name: media_plan_master_id
schema.description: Links to the master media plan record.

schema.name: line_item_id
schema.description: The optional line item ID this asset is associated with.

schema.name: source_table
schema.description: The source table from which the line item ID originates.

schema.name: asset_name
schema.description: The display name for the creative asset.

schema.name: original_filename
schema.description: The original filename of the uploaded asset.

schema.name: mime_type
schema.description: The MIME type of the asset (e.g., image/jpeg, video/mp4).

schema.name: file_size_bytes
schema.description: The size of the file in bytes.

schema.name: width_px
schema.description: The width of the asset in pixels (for images/videos).

schema.name: height_px
schema.description: The height of the asset in pixels (for images/videos).

schema.name: duration_seconds
schema.description: The duration of the asset in seconds (for videos).

schema.name: blob_url
schema.description: The URL to the stored blob asset (e.g., Vercel Blob URL).

schema.name: blob_pathname
schema.description: The pathname of the blob asset, used for deletion or management.

schema.name: status
schema.description: The current status of the asset (active or archived).

schema.name: uploaded_by_email
schema.description: The email of the user who uploaded the asset.

schema.name: uploaded_by_role
schema.description: The role of the user who uploaded the asset.

finance_billing_line_items.description: Stores individual line items for financial billing records.

schema.name: finance_billing_records_id
schema.description: References the parent `finance_billing_records` table.

schema.name: item_code
schema.description: Unique code for the billing line item.

schema.name: line_type
schema.description: The type of line item: 'media', 'service', 'fee', or 'retainer'.

schema.name: media_type
schema.description: The type of media for the line item (e.g., 'Digital Display', 'TV').

schema.name: description
schema.description: A description of the line item.

schema.name: publisher_name
schema.description: The name of the publisher, used for grouping in publisher views.

schema.name: amount
schema.description: The amount for this line item.

schema.name: client_pays_media
schema.description: Indicates if the client directly pays for this media, to be excluded from publisher views when true (default false).

schema.name: sort_order
schema.description: Order for displaying line items (default 0).

schema.name: updated_at
schema.description: Automatically updated timestamp for when the record was last modified.

schema.name: line_item_id
schema.description: Schedule JSON lineItemId (e.g. billing-socialMedia::BICAU003SM1) for orphan matching.

schema.name: line_status
schema.description: Line status for tracking received, disputed, or variance states.

schema.name: received_at
schema.description: When the publisher invoice arrived (payables side).

schema.name: received_amount
schema.description: If the received invoice amount differs from expected.

schema.name: note
schema.description: Free-text note per line item.

schema.name: orphaned
schema.description: Soft-delete flag — set true when the matching lineItemId is removed from the schedule.

schema.name: media_plan_version_number
schema.description: Version snapshot at time of row creation, for orphan traceability.

finance_billing_records.description: Stores detailed financial billing and invoice records.

schema.name: clients_id
schema.description: References the `clients` table to link this billing record to a specific client.

schema.name: client_name
schema.description: The name of the client, denormalized for easier list queries without joins.

schema.name: billing_type
schema.description: The type of billing: 'media', 'sow', or 'retainer'.

schema.name: mba_number
schema.description: The MBA number associated with the billing record (nullable).

schema.name: campaign_name
schema.description: The name of the campaign associated with the billing record (nullable).

schema.name: po_number
schema.description: The Purchase Order number (nullable).

schema.name: billing_month
schema.description: The billing month in 'YYYY-MM' format, useful for indexing.

schema.name: invoice_date
schema.description: The date the invoice was issued (nullable).

schema.name: payment_days
schema.description: The number of days until payment is due (default 30).

schema.name: payment_terms
schema.description: The payment terms (default 'Net 30 days').

schema.name: status
schema.description: The current status of the billing record: 'draft', 'booked', 'approved', 'invoiced', 'paid', 'cancelled'.

schema.name: total
schema.description: The server-calculated total sum of child line items.

schema.name: has_pending_edits
schema.description: Indicates if the record has pending edits (default false).

schema.name: source_billing_schedule_id
schema.description: Links back to the original billing_schedule record if migrated (nullable).

schema.name: updated_at
schema.description: Automatically updated timestamp for when the record was last modified.

schema.name: billed
schema.description: Has the client invoice been raised in Xero AND sent to the client

schema.name: billed_at
schema.description: When the invoice was marked billed

schema.name: billed_by
schema.description: User id who marked it billed

schema.name: notes
schema.description: Free-text finance note on the invoice

schema.name: exported_at
schema.description: When this row was last included in a Xero export batch

schema.name: exported_by
schema.description: User id who triggered the export

schema.name: invoice_key
schema.description: Discriminated composite key for uniqueness across billing types — written by app, see Stage 2.2

finance_edits.description: Tracks changes and edits made to financial billing records and line items.

schema.name: finance_billing_records_id
schema.description: References the `finance_billing_records` table, indicating which record was edited (nullable).

schema.name: finance_billing_line_items_id
schema.description: References the `finance_billing_line_items` table, indicating which line item was edited (nullable).

schema.name: edit_type
schema.description: The type of edit: 'field_change', 'amount_change', 'status_change', 'line_add', or 'line_remove'.

schema.name: field_name
schema.description: The name of the field that was changed.

schema.name: old_value
schema.description: The value of the field before the edit (nullable).

schema.name: new_value
schema.description: The value of the field after the edit (nullable).

schema.name: edit_status
schema.description: The status of the edit: 'draft', 'published', or 'reverted'.

schema.name: edited_by
schema.description: References the `user` table to identify who made the edit (nullable).

schema.name: edited_by_name
schema.description: The name of the user who made the edit.

schema.name: published_at
schema.description: The timestamp when the edit was published (nullable).

schema.name: record_type
schema.description: Discriminator for what kind of edit this is (status_change, amount_change, accrual_reconcile, schedule_patch, line_remove)

finance_saved_views.description: Stores user-defined saved views for financial data with custom filters.

schema.name: user
schema.description: References the `user` table to link this saved view to a specific user.

schema.name: view_name
schema.description: The name given to the saved view.

schema.name: filters
schema.description: A JSON object containing the filter criteria for the view (e.g., clients, billing types, month range, statuses).

schema.name: is_default
schema.description: Indicates if this is the user's default view (default false).

schema.name: updated_at
schema.description: Automatically updated timestamp for when the record was last modified.

media_container_best_practice.description: Table to store best practices for media containers.

schema.name: id
schema.description: Unique identifier for each record.

schema.name: created_at
schema.description: Timestamp when the record was created.

schema.name: updated_at
schema.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

schema.name: media_container
schema.description: The container key/slug (e.g., radio, programmatic).

schema.name: best_practice
schema.description: Best practice data structure.

schema.name: is_active
schema.description: Toggle to activate or deactivate this section.

schema.name: _name
schema.description: Name of the last user who edited the record.

media_plan_cinema.description: Stores cinema line-item details for Media Plan Versions.

schema.name: media_plan_version
schema.description: Links this cinema line item back to the specific version in the `media_plan_versions` table.

schema.name: mba_number
schema.description: The MBA number associated with this cinema line item.

schema.name: mp_client_name
schema.description: The client name associated with this cinema line item.

schema.name: mp_plannumber
schema.description: The plan number associated with this cinema line item.

schema.name: network
schema.description: The cinema network.

schema.description: The type of buy (e.g., CPM, fixed rate).

schema.name: format
schema.description: The format of the cinema ad.

schema.name: buying_demo
schema.description: The demographic targeted for the buy.

schema.name: market
schema.description: The market for the cinema placement.

schema.name: fixed_cost_media
schema.description: Indicates if the media has a fixed cost.

schema.name: client_pays_for_media
schema.description: Indicates if the client pays for the media.

schema.name: budget_includes_fees
schema.description: Indicates if the budget includes fees.

schema.name: no_adserving
schema.description: Indicates if ad serving is not applicable for this cinema line item.

schema.name: line_item_id
schema.description: The unique ID for the cinema line item.

schema.name: line_item
schema.description: The line item number.

schema.name: station
schema.description: The specific station or location for the cinema placement.

schema.name: placement
schema.description: The specific placement details for the cinema ad.

schema.name: duration
schema.description: The duration of the creative for the cinema ad.

schema.name: bursts
schema.description: Stores an array of all bursts associated with this line item.

schema.name: bid_strategy
schema.description: The bidding strategy used.

media_plan_versions.description: Stores different versions of Media Plans.

scope_of_work.description: Stores detailed information for client scopes of work.

schema.name: client_name
schema.description: The name of the client for this scope of work.

schema.name: contact_name
schema.description: The primary contact person for the client.

schema.name: contact_email
schema.description: The email of the primary client contact.

schema.name: scope_date
schema.description: The date the scope of work was created or last updated.

schema.name: scope_version
schema.description: The version number of this scope of work.

schema.name: project_name
schema.description: The name of the project.

schema.name: project_status
schema.description: The current status of the project (e.g., Draft, Approved, In Progress, Completed).

schema.name: project_overview
schema.description: A high-level overview of the project.

schema.name: deliverables
schema.description: Specific items or results to be delivered.

schema.name: tasks_steps
schema.description: A breakdown of tasks or steps required to complete the project.

schema.name: timelines
schema.description: Key dates and deadlines for the project.

schema.name: responsibilities
schema.description: Clarification of roles and responsibilities for all parties.

schema.name: requirements
schema.description: Necessary conditions or features for project success.

schema.name: assumptions
schema.description: Any assumptions made during the planning of the scope of work.

schema.name: exclusions
schema.description: Items or services specifically excluded from the scope.

schema.name: cost
schema.description: Detailed cost breakdown for the project, stored as JSON.

schema.name: payment_terms_and_conditions
schema.description: The payment terms and conditions for the project.

schema.name: role
schema.description: User's role in the application (e.g., admin, user).

schema.name: google_id
schema.description: User's Google ID for Google login.

schema.name: profile_settings
schema.description: User's profile settings.

xero_ap_bills.description: Table for Xero Accounts Payable Bills (Supplier Bills)

schema.name: id
schema.description: Primary key

schema.name: xero_invoice_id
schema.description: Xero InvoiceID (GUID)

schema.name: invoice_number
schema.description: Bill number

schema.name: xero_contact_id
schema.description: FK to xero_contacts.xero_contact_id (Publisher)

schema.name: status
schema.description: DRAFT, SUBMITTED, AUTHORISED, PAID, VOIDED

schema.name: sub_total
schema.description: Total before tax

schema.name: total_tax
schema.description: Total tax amount

schema.name: total
schema.description: Total invoice amount

schema.name: amount_paid
schema.description: Amount paid so far

schema.name: amount_due
schema.description: Remaining amount due

schema.name: currency
schema.description: Currency code

schema.name: issue_date
schema.description: Date bill was issued

schema.name: due_date
schema.description: Date bill is due

schema.name: fully_paid_date
schema.description: Date the bill was fully paid

schema.name: activity_month
schema.description: The payables activity month

schema.name: reference_raw
schema.description: Xero Reference stored verbatim

schema.name: line_items_json
schema.description: Full LineItems array from Xero

schema.name: pdf_file
schema.description: Stored PDF copy of the bill

schema.name: xero_updated_utc
schema.description: Xero UpdatedDateUTC for delta syncs

schema.name: last_synced_at
schema.description: Last time this record was touched by sync

schema.name: raw_json
schema.description: Full raw JSON from Xero for Accounts Payable bill.

xero_ar_invoices.description: Table for Xero Accounts Receivable Invoices (Sales)

schema.name: id
schema.description: Primary key

schema.name: xero_invoice_id
schema.description: Xero InvoiceID (GUID)

schema.name: invoice_number
schema.description: Xero InvoiceNumber

schema.name: xero_contact_id
schema.description: FK to xero_contacts.xero_contact_id

schema.name: status
schema.description: DRAFT, SUBMITTED, AUTHORISED, PAID, VOIDED

schema.name: sub_total
schema.description: Total before tax

schema.name: total_tax
schema.description: Total tax amount

schema.name: total
schema.description: Total invoice amount

schema.name: amount_paid
schema.description: Amount paid so far

schema.name: amount_due
schema.description: Remaining amount due

schema.name: currency
schema.description: Currency code (e.g., AUD)

schema.name: issue_date
schema.description: Date invoice was issued

schema.name: due_date
schema.description: Date invoice is due

schema.name: fully_paid_date
schema.description: Date the invoice was fully paid

schema.name: reference_raw
schema.description: Xero Reference stored verbatim

schema.name: mba_number
schema.description: Parsed MBA number from reference

schema.name: mba_match_id
schema.description: FK to the AssembledView MBA record once matched

schema.name: line_items_json
schema.description: Full LineItems array from Xero

schema.name: pdf_file
schema.description: Stored PDF copy of the invoice

schema.name: xero_updated_utc
schema.description: Xero UpdatedDateUTC for delta syncs

schema.name: last_synced_at
schema.description: Last time this record was touched by sync

schema.name: raw_json
schema.description: Full raw JSON from Xero for Accounts Receivable invoice.

xero_contacts.description: Table for Xero Contacts (Clients and Publishers)

schema.name: id
schema.description: Primary key

schema.name: xero_contact_id
schema.description: Xero ContactID GUID

schema.name: name
schema.description: Contact Name

schema.name: role
schema.description: client or publisher

schema.name: email
schema.description: Contact Email

schema.name: raw_json
schema.description: Full raw JSON from Xero

schema.name: synced_at
schema.description: When this record was last synced

xero_invoices.description: Table for Xero Invoices (both ACCREC and ACCPAY)

schema.name: id
schema.description: Primary key

schema.name: xero_invoice_id
schema.description: Xero InvoiceID GUID

schema.name: invoice_number
schema.description: Invoice number (e.g. INV-1152)

schema.name: type
schema.description: ACCREC or ACCPAY

schema.name: status
schema.description: DRAFT, SUBMITTED, AUTHORISED, PAID, VOIDED

schema.name: contact_xero_id
schema.description: Links to xero_contacts.xero_contact_id

schema.name: contact_name
schema.description: Contact Name

schema.name: reference
schema.description: The Campaign | MBA string

schema.name: mba_number
schema.description: Parsed last segment of reference; AR only

schema.name: currency
schema.description: Currency code

schema.name: sub_total
schema.description: Sub-total amount

schema.name: total_tax
schema.description: Total tax amount

schema.name: total
schema.description: Total amount

schema.name: amount_due
schema.description: Amount due

schema.name: amount_paid
schema.description: Amount paid

schema.name: invoice_date
schema.description: Invoice date

schema.name: due_date
schema.description: Due date

schema.name: updated_date_utc
schema.description: Xero UpdatedDateUTC, used as the delta watermark

schema.name: line_items_json
schema.description: Line items in JSON format

schema.name: raw_json
schema.description: Full raw JSON from Xero

schema.name: pdf_file
schema.description: PDF file attachment

schema.name: match_status
schema.description: matched, unmatched, ambiguous

schema.name: synced_at
schema.description: When this record was last synced

xero_sync_exceptions.description: Exceptions and unmatched records from Xero Sync

schema.name: id
schema.description: Primary key

schema.name: xero_invoice_id
schema.description: Xero InvoiceID GUID (nullable)

schema.name: invoice_number
schema.description: Invoice number (nullable)

schema.name: reference
schema.description: Reference (nullable)

schema.name: reason
schema.description: Reason (e.g. MBA not found, ambiguous match, missing reference)

schema.name: raw_json
schema.description: Full raw JSON from Xero

schema.name: resolved
schema.description: Whether the exception has been manually resolved

schema.name: created_at
schema.description: When the exception was logged

schema.name: issue_date
schema.description: The invoice issue date (for cutoff filtering)

schema.name: id
schema.description: Primary key

schema.name: run_started_at
schema.description: When the sync run started

schema.name: run_finished_at
schema.description: When the sync run finished

schema.name: status
schema.description: success, partial, failed

schema.name: watermark_used
schema.description: The If-Modified-Since watermark sent

schema.name: new_watermark
schema.description: max UpdatedDateUTC seen this run

schema.name: invoices_upserted
schema.description: Count of invoices upserted

schema.name: contacts_upserted
schema.description: Count of contacts upserted

schema.name: notes
schema.description: General notes or error messages
